summary:
CT scan radiation increases lifelong cancer risk, especially for pediatric and prenatal patients. Resident training using visualization aids improves understanding and supports safer, more justified use of CT based on ALARA guidelines.  

(End of Round)

Is this summary accurate? Yes

What is your next action?
Continue to Round 2
